texto: Sky is not a limit for me
autor: because I have no limit for myself in life. Because life is a world full of risk taking and possibilities. No matter how hard or easy life is
explicacao: Citação de because I have no limit for myself in life. Because life is a world full of risk taking and possibilities. No matter how hard or easy life is sobre temas ligados a motivacao. “Sky is not a limit for me” articula motivacao, inspiracional, reflexao em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e reflexao.
